sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60129" key="*kronoqh/kh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Κρονο-θήκη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n60129.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">receptacle for old follies</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1054</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
